description_long: This is a modern two-story urban house with a mix of brick, concrete, and wood paneling on its exterior. The front facade features large windows, a recessed entryway, and a landscaped garden with trees, shrubs, and a patio area. The side and rear elevations display a combination of brickwork and smooth wall surfaces, with several windows of varying sizes and a prominent garage door. The house includes a balcony and a fenced backyard area, providing outdoor living space. The roof is flat, typical of contemporary urban architecture, and the window arrangement is asymmetrical, adding visual interest. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story urban house with brick and concrete exterior, large windows, a flat roof, and landscaped front and rear gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, landscaped garden, and patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, garage door, and a large picture window with a planter.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a fenced backyard, and a flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony, additional windows, and more of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and varied sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a modern door, small steps, and a landscaped patio area
